chunks.text: Delay Comparison of Different Switch Architectures (EECS-2013-204) by Stephan Adams, Longbo Huang, Abhay Parekh and Jean Walrand. Convergence and Stability of a Distributed CSMA Algorithm for Maximal Network Throughput (EECS-2009-43) by Libin Jiang and Jean Walrand.

Approaching Throughput-optimality in a Distributed CSMA Algorithm with Contention Resolution (EECS-2009-37) by Libin Jiang and Jean Walrand. A Novel Approach to Model and Control the Throughput of CSMA/CA Wireless Networks (EECS-2009-8) by Libin Jiang and Jean Walrand. Convergence Analysis of a Distributed CSMA Algorithm for Maximal Throughput in a General Class of Networks (EECS-2008-185) by Libin Jiang and Jean Walrand. How Bad are Selfish Investments in Network Security? (EECS-2008-183) by Libin Jiang, Venkat Anantharam and Jean Walrand.

Spectrum Agile Radios Project Report (EECS-2008-142) by Ji Woong Lee, Pedram Keshavarz, Miklos Christine, Sherman Ng, Sofie Pollin, Libin Jiang, Jean Walrand and Hidekazu Miyoshi. Efficiency of Selfish Investments in Network Security (EECS-2008-77) by Libin Jiang, Venkat Anantharam and Jean Walrand. A Distributed Algorithm for Maximal Throughput and Optimal Fairness in Wireless Networks with a General Interference Model (EECS-2008-38) by Libin Jiang and Jean Walrand. Distributed Fair Scheduling with Variable Transmission Lengths in IEEE 802.11 Wireless Networks (EECS-2007-88) by Libin Jiang and Jean Walrand.

ZeroCollision Random Backoff Algorithm (EECS-2007-63) by Ji Woong Lee and Jean Walrand. A Distributed Max-Min Fairness Rate Allocation Algorithm For Unreliable Communication Networks (EECS-2006-73) by Jingyi Shao and Jean Walrand. Bandwidth Guaranteed Routing for Ad Hoc Networks with Interference Consideration (M04/43) by Z. Jia, R. Gupta, Jean Walrand and Pravin Varaiya. Sufficient Rate Constraints for QoS Flows in Ad-Hoc Networks (M04/42) by R. Gupta, J. Musacchio and Jean Walrand. The WebTP Architecture and Algorithms (M00/53) by Y. Xia, H-S. W. So, Venkat Anantharam, S. McCanne, David Tse, Jean Walrand and Pravin Varaiya.

The Framework of User-Centric Optimization in Web-Based Applications (M00/52) by Y. Xia, H-S. W. So, R. H-J. La, Venkat Anantharam, S. McCanne, David Tse, Jean Walrand and Pravin Varaiya. Issues in TCP Vegas (M99/3) by R.J. La, Jean Walrand and Venkat Anantharam. Fair End-to-End Window-Based Congestion Control (M98/46) by J. Mo and Jean Walrand. Quick Detection of Changes in Traffic Statistics: Application to Variable Rate Compression (M94/88) by I. Hsu and Jean Walrand.

Admission Control for ATM Networks (M94/44) by I. Hsu and Jean Walrand. Decoupling Bandwidths for Networks: A Decomposition Approach to Resource Management (M93/50) by G. de Veciana, C. Courcoubetis and Jean Walrand. Effective Bandwidths: Call Admission, Traffic Policing and Filtering for ATM Networks (M93/47) by G. de Veciana and Jean Walrand. Traffic Shaping for ATM Networks: Asymptotic Analysis and Simulations (M92/135) by G. de Veciana and Jean Walrand.

Large Deviations for Birth Death Markov Fluids (M92/88) by G. de Veciana, C. Olivier and Jean Walrand. On the Existence of Finite Dimensional Filters for Markov Modulated Traffic (M92/48) by C. Olivier and Jean Walrand. Buffer Design for Multiclass Traffic in ATM Networks (M92/45) by G. Kesidis and Jean Walrand. Relative Entropy Between Markov Transition Rate Matrices (M92/44) by G. Effective Bandwidths for Multiclass Markov Fluids and Other ATM Sources (M92/40) by G. Kesidis and Jean Walrand. Admission Control and Routing in ATM Networks Using Inferences From Measured Buffered Occupancy (M91/37) by C. Courcoubetis, G. Kesidis, A. Ridder, Jean Walrand and R. Weber. Generalized Multi-Server Queueing Systems (M89/61) by N. Bambos and Jean Walrand. An Alternative Approach to the Problem of the Asymptotic Makespan of Serially Multi-Tasked Jobs (M88/79) by N. Bambos and Jean Walrand.

Recent Results on the Asymptotic Behavior of Concurrent Processing Systems Under Stationary and Ergodic Inputs (M88/78) by N. Bambos and Jean Walrand. Quick Simulation Method for Excessive Backlogs in Networks of Queues (M86/74) by Shyam Parekh and Jean Walrand. Instability and Geometric Transience of the Aloha Protocol (M86/73) by Shyam Parekh, F. Scheduling Jobs with Stochastically Ordered Processing Times on Parallel Machines to Minimize Expected Flowtime (M84/57) by R.R. Weber, Pravin Varaiya and Jean Walrand. Extensions of the Multi-Armed Bandit Problem (M83/14) by Pravin Varaiya, Jean Walrand and C. Buyukkoc. Optimal Causal Coding-Decoding Problems (M82/3) by J. Walrand and P. Varaiya. Interconnections of Markov Chains and Quasi-Reversible Queuing Networks (M79/38) by Jean Walrand and Pravin Varaiya. A Simple Dynamic Routing Problem (M79/37) by A. Ephremides, P. Varaiya and J. Walrand. Sojourn Times and the Overtaking Condition in Jacksonian Networks (M79/35) by J. Walrand and P. Varaiya. The Outputs of Jacksonian Networks are Poissonian (M78/60) by Jean Walrand and Pravin Varaiya.

When is a Flow in a Queuing Network Poissonian? (M78/59) by Jean Walrand and Pravin Varaiya. On Delayed Sharing Patterns (M77/38) by P. Varaiya and J. Walrand. Decentralized Stochastic Control (M77/32) by P. Varaiya and J. Walrand.
